"""Quick smoke test of the agent loading + one rollout step locally without eval_config."""
import os, sys, json
os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE']='1'
import numpy as np, random, torch

sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from predict import build_pi0_agent, Pi0Agent

np.random.seed(0); random.seed(0)

# Pick best GPU
best, best_free = 0, 0
for i in range(torch.cuda.device_count()):
    free, _ = torch.cuda.mem_get_info(i)
    if free > best_free:
        best_free=free; best=i
device=f'cuda:{best}'
print('Using', device, 'free', best_free/1e9, 'GB')

policy, pre, post, device = build_pi0_agent(device=device)
agent = Pi0Agent(policy, pre, post, device, chunk_size=10)

# Load a real env to test agent.predict signature
from VLABench.envs import load_env
import VLABench.tasks  # ensure registry

# Try one of the eval tasks
import time
try:
    env = load_env('add_condiment', robot='franka', time_limit=20)
    print('Env loaded')
    obs = env.get_observation(require_pcd=False)
    print('obs keys:', list(obs.keys()) if hasattr(obs,'keys') else type(obs))
    if hasattr(obs, 'keys'):
        for k in obs.keys():
            v = obs[k]
            if hasattr(v, 'shape'):
                print(f'  {k}: {v.shape} {getattr(v,"dtype",None)}')
            else:
                print(f'  {k}: {type(v).__name__} = {str(v)[:100]}')
    agent.reset()
    t0=time.time()
    pos, euler, grip = agent.predict(obs)
    print('predict took', time.time()-t0, 's')
    print('pos:', pos, 'euler:', euler, 'grip:', grip)
except Exception as e:
    import traceback; traceback.print_exc()
